Welcome to Tasty-Slice

Welcome to the ultimate experience in flavor and tradition. In our kitchen, pizza is treated as an art form, where every dough is hand-stretched and baked at high temperatures to reach the perfect crunch. We use only selected ingredients, from fresh tomato sauce to premium toppings that melt in your mouth. Whether for a relaxing night at home or a special celebration, our commitment is to deliver not just a meal, but an unforgettable moment of gastronomic pleasure.

The Restaurant

Our restaurant is more than just a place to eat; it's a family-run space where tradition meets passion. Our dedicated staff works tirelessly to ensure that every guest feels at home, serving authentic recipes in a cozy and modern atmosphere.

Our Delicious Menu

Fresh ingredients and traditional recipes.

Pizzas

  • Margherita
    Tomato sauce, mozzarella, and fresh basil.
    £12
  • Pepperoni
    Classic pepperoni with spicy tomato sauce.
    £15
  • Four Cheese
    Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and fontina.
    £16

Drinks

  • Craft Beer
    Local selection of IPA and Lager.
    £6
  • Red Wine
    A glass of our finest Italian House Wine.
    £8
  • Soft Drinks
    Coke, Sprite, or Fresh Lemonade.
    £4
